ABOUT JSG

One company, two crafts — fabrication and interiors, under one roof.

JSG Engineering & Interiors started as a structural fabrication workshop and grew into a full turnkey partner — we raise the structure and finish the space, so clients deal with one accountable team instead of juggling contractors.

15 years, 500+ projects In-house design + fab team Site visit in 24 hours Workmanship warranty
01

Fabrication wing

Structural steel, sheds, staircases, gates and custom machinery built to load and IS-code specification.

02

Interiors wing

Residential, commercial and turnkey interior execution — design, materials and installation in one workflow.

FABRICATION & ENGINEERING

Steel that's engineered for load, not just for looks.

Every job is calculated, drawn and signed off before a single weld is struck.

Industrial sheds & warehouses

PEB and conventional steel sheds — factories, warehouses, godowns — designed for your span and load.

Structural steel framing

Columns, trusses and mezzanine framing fabricated and erected to IS-code structural standards.

Staircases & railings

Spiral, straight-run and cantilever staircases with MS, SS or glass railing finishes.

Gates, grills & fences

Automated and manual gates, security grills and boundary fencing in MS, SS and wrought iron.

Custom machinery & equipment

Bespoke jigs, racking, platforms and process equipment fabricated to your drawing or our design.

Maintenance & repair

Structural inspections, repainting, reinforcement and emergency repair for existing steelwork.

INTERIORS

Finishes that hold up to daily life, not just photographs.

Residential, commercial and retail spaces — designed, sourced and installed by one team.

Residential interiors

Full-home and single-room interiors — living rooms, bedrooms, wardrobes and storage.

Commercial & office interiors

Workstations, cabins, reception and retail fit-outs designed for footfall and daily wear.

Modular kitchens

L-shape, U-shape and island layouts in marine plywood with laminate, acrylic or PU finish.

False ceiling & lighting

POP and gypsum ceiling design with cove, profile and accent lighting layouts.

Furniture & woodwork

Custom carpentry — sofas, beds, study units and TV units built and finished in-house.

Turnkey projects

One quote, one timeline, one team — from civil and structure through to final styling.

HOW WE WORK

Six steps from first call to handover — the same sequence, every project.

01

Site visit

Engineer visits within 24 hours of enquiry to measure and understand the brief.

02

Design & estimate

Drawings, structural calculations or design layout with a transparent line-item quote.

03

Material selection

Steel grade, plywood, laminate and fittings finalised and shown before ordering.

04

Fabrication

Cutting, welding and carpentry executed in our workshop under quality checks.

05

Installation

On-site erection or fit-out by our own crew, not third-party labour.

06

Handover & warranty

Final walkthrough, documentation and workmanship warranty on file.

Gates, grills, staircases — fabricated in our workshop.

Every piece shown here was designed, cut, welded and finished by our in-house team in Bangalore.

THE KIND OF WORK WE DO

Three representative examples — same process, every time.

INDUSTRIAL FABRICATION

Warehouse shed fabrication, Hoskote

ProblemAn ageing tin-shed structure failing under monsoon load, with visible truss corrosion.
ApproachRe-engineer the roof with PEB trusses and correct the slope and drainage.
ResultStructure rebuilt while keeping the client's warehouse operational throughout.
↳ This is the kind of repair-and-rebuild job we take on regularly
COMMERCIAL INTERIOR

Office fit-out, Electronic City

ProblemA bare-shell office needing a full workstation and cabin layout before a lease start date.
ApproachRun civil, electrical and modular furniture work in parallel instead of in sequence.
ResultWorkstations and cabins delivered ready for move-in, on a tight timeline.
↳ A typical scope for our commercial fit-out projects
RESIDENTIAL INTERIOR

Full-home interior, Whitefield

ProblemA family wanting a full-home interior, including a modular kitchen, on a fixed budget.
ApproachValue-engineer material choices and run carpentry and civil work together.
ResultComplete handover with no compromise on the kitchen or wardrobe finish.
↳ A typical scope for our full-home interior projects

Representative examples of our typical scope of work — ask us for references from recent clients.

WHY JSG

The reasons clients stop juggling separate contractors.

Single accountable team

One contract, one project manager, for both structure and finish — no passing the blame between contractors.

Site visit within 24 hours

An engineer or designer visits your site within a day of enquiry — no week-long wait for a callback.

Transparent, line-item quotes

Every quote is itemised by material and labour in writing — no surprise additions mid-project.

Written workmanship warranty

Fabrication and installation work is backed by a written warranty, plus after-sales support on call.

CAREERS AT JSG

We're hiring — join the team that builds and finishes both.

Current openings across our fabrication workshop and interior execution team. Walk-ins welcome with your tools and ID proof.

FABRICATION

Welder / Fabricator (MS & SS)

2+ years experience in arc/MIG welding, gates, railings and structural steel. Site and workshop both.

2–5 yrs expBangalore
INTERIORS

Carpenter — Modular & Site Furniture

Skilled in modular kitchen, wardrobe and furniture carpentry, both factory-made and site-fixed work.

3+ yrs expBangalore
DESIGN & SITE

Site Supervisor / Project Coordinator

Coordinate fabrication and interior site teams, manage timelines, materials and client updates.

1–3 yrs expBangalore
COMMON QUESTIONS

Things every client asks before saying yes.

Don't see your question here? Send it on WhatsApp — we reply within working hours.

Cost depends on area, material grade and finish level. We give a written, line-item quote after the site visit — never a verbal ballpark — so there are no surprises later.

A standard industrial shed runs 30–45 days; a full home interior runs 60–90 days depending on scope. The exact timeline is fixed in writing before work begins.

Yes. We work with a set of trusted material partners but you can request specific steel grades, plywood or laminate brands — we'll quote accordingly.

Every project carries a written workmanship warranty, and our team remains reachable for after-sales service and minor repairs after handover.

For larger interior projects, we can connect you with partner financing for EMI-based payment — ask your project manager during the quote stage.

We serve all of Bangalore — including Whitefield, Electronic City, HSR Layout, Koramangala, Marathahalli, Hoskote, Kengeri, Yelahanka and Hebbal — and take on select projects beyond, depending on scope.
